content.en:
"I passed the third assessment so quickly!"

The Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor was a little surprised, you must know that even if he broke into the Inner Domain of the Ancient Golden Tablet last time, he only passed the third assessment, and it took a long time, and he almost didn't break through.

Ao Heng didn't pass the third assessment last time, and stopped at this one assessment.

It can be said that among the primeval-level geniuses in the territorial sea boundary seam, there are simply only a handful of them who can pass the third assessment.

At this time, Ye Tian had passed the third assessment, which had brought great pressure to the other top primordial-level geniuses.

After Ye Tian passed the third assessment, he continued to move forward.

Soon, he was once again shrouded in a golden light from the Ancient Gold Tablet, which merged into his body, and the information he carried informed him of the fourth assessment.

"Create the Ancient Bone Technique!"

What the Ancient Bone Technique was, he really didn't know anything, he didn't understand this thing at all.

However, the Ancient Golden Tablet passed on to him a copy of the Ancient Bone Technique, so that he could create other Ancient Bone Techniques according to this Ancient Bone Technique, and he had to use the thirteen Ancient Golden Scripts he had comprehended before to create an Ancient Bone Technique, even if it was the lowest level of the Ancient Bone Technique, as long as it met the requirements.

"It's a bit hard!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, the time given by the Taikoo Golden Tablet was still relatively abundant, so he was not hopeless.

Subsequently, he tried to create the Ancient Bone Technique with all his might, but the premise was that he had to thoroughly understand the Ancient Bone Technique given by the Ancient Golden Tablet, so that he could use the thirteen Ancient Golden Scripts to create the Ancient Bone Technique that met the requirements.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian continued to study the Ancient Bone Technique, from knowing nothing to gradually having some understanding.

"This primeval bone technique has something to do with immeasurable bones!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

It seems that the ancient bone surgery can be combined with the immeasurable bone and can make the immeasurable bone transform, but this is not the case, and it has to be tested.

"It's better to let the copy body practice the Ancient Bone Technique given by the Ancient Golden Tablet, even if this Ancient Bone Technique is very low-level and not very useful, but I just use the copy body to experiment, after the cultivation is completed, the copy body can be directly annihilated, and it will not affect the other copy bodies!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

As a result, his other replica body practiced this primeval bone technique in the Sword Chen Sea.

Due to his lack of understanding of the Ancient Bone Technique, he failed to cultivate at the beginning, directly damaging the foundation of the Infinite Bone.

But he didn't care about this, he continued to cultivate, and through cultivating again and again to comprehend the Ancient Bone Technique, so as to have a better understanding of the Ancient Bone Technique.

Other primordial-level geniuses didn't dare to do this, it would make the body directly scrapped.

But Ye Tian has a lot of copy bodies, so he is extremely willful.

After a period of time, Ye Tian's replica body had been scrapped, and the foundation had been destroyed.

Then, he made another copy of the body to practice the Ancient Bone Technique.

In this way, after a period of time, Ye Tian finally practiced this primeval bone technique, and also had a qualitative understanding of the primeval bone technique.

"The primeval osteopathy can be integrated into the immeasurable bone and make the immeasurable bone produce bone changes, but an ancient osteopathy can only cause one immeasurable bone to produce bone changes. "

Ye Tian had an idea at this moment, that is, the realm above the powerhouse of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, would it have something to do with the bone transformation?

"No, it must have a relationship!"

Ye Tian concluded.

It's just that there is too little information about the realm above the Nine Blood Transformation Realms, so he can't know more.

But at this moment, Ye Tian understood the Taigu Bone Technique, and there was still a lot of hope for creating his own Spicy Chicken Taigu Bone Technique.

In the years that followed, he began to create his own primeval osteopathy.

As the years passed, the technique created by Ye Tian from the beginning could only be regarded as a little bit of a reliance on the Ancient Bone Technique, but it was not the Ancient Bone Technique, so it was not recognized by the Ancient Golden Tablet.

Thirteen primeval golden inscriptions, primeval bone techniques, mutual perception and combination, coupled with the experiment of replicating the body, a little bit of success appeared.

At the same time, the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor finally passed the third assessment and came to the fourth assessment.

Since the Heavenly Ancestor of the Immortal Sword had been here many times, the Ancient Golden Tablet directly asked him to create the Ancient Bone Technique, and did not give him an Ancient Bone Technique inheritance as a comparison.

"I failed last time, I don't know if I can pass the fourth assessment this time?"

The Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor said secretly in his heart.

In fact, he had created the Ancient Bone Technique, and even more than one, but this time it had to be the thirteen Ancient Golden Texts that he had just comprehended to create the Ancient Bone Technique, and the other Ancient Bone Techniques would not work.

He had passed the third assessment twice before, and he fell in the fourth assessment and didn't pass it, but after leaving the Taigu Golden Monument, it took a long time to create it, but it was useless.

Therefore, he hopes to pass the fourth assessment this time.

At this time.

Many of the other primordial-level geniuses have been eliminated, and only a few of the primordial-level geniuses who remain here are still passing through the third assessment.

Outside the outer realm of the primeval gold monument.

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor and they are still waiting here, they are waiting for the three domains of the Ancient Golden Tablet to disappear, so that they can approach the Ancient Golden Tablet to receive benefits.

Of course, the premise is that all those primordial-level geniuses in the inner region are eliminated, and if there is still an primordial-level genius, they can only wait.

"According to the time, it won't be long before these primeval-level geniuses will be eliminated!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor muttered.

Another period of time had passed, and the Blood Sword Heavenly Ancestor, Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, and other top primordial-level geniuses had been excluded from the Inner Domain.

"Blood Sword Heavenly Ancestor, the other primordial-level geniuses in the inner realm should be excluded, right?" asked an primordial-level genius.

"I don't know!" Blood Sword Heavenly Ancestor said: "My Master, Endless Heavenly Ancestor, Ao Heng, Moyu Heavenly Ancestor, Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor, these people are still participating in the fourth assessment. Not enough, according to estimates, except for the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, the others should have little hope of passing the fourth assessment!"

Hearing that the Blood Sword Heavenly Ancestor had such a high opinion of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, many Heavenly Ancestors were shocked.

"Is the Endless Heavenly Ancestor so demonic?"

An ancient-level genius was taken aback.

The Blood Sword Heavenly Ancestor sighed with emotion: "I also want to be optimistic about my master, but I know my master, and there is very little hope of passing the fourth assessment, but the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is indeed too demonic, and he passed the first three assessments too quickly, so there is some hope for the fourth assessment." "

"Wait, it won't be long before we know the result. But if the Endless Heavenly Ancestor really passed the fourth assessment, he would go through the fifth assessment, then we would have to wait even longer!" the Blood Sword Heavenly Ancestor muttered.
